target.title: [codex] update Crabbox agent skill
target.body:
Closes #460

## Summary

- refresh `.agents/skills/crabbox/SKILL.md` for the current Crabbox CLI and documentation surface
- remove stale project-specific provider guidance and keep the skill product-neutral
- add current workflows for `prewarm`, jobs, ready pools, profiles/presets/proof, run artifacts, desktop/WebVNC proof, and delegated-provider boundaries

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `go run ./cmd/crabbox --help`
- `go run ./cmd/crabbox run --help`
- `go run ./cmd/crabbox providers --json`
- `rg -n "OpenClaw|OpenClawd|Peter|blacksmith-testbox first|daemon start|daemon stop|Waybar|TODO|FIXME|/Users/" .agents/skills/crabbox/SKILL.md`
target.author: coygeek
